title: Backrooms
notes: Official A24 film listing identifying Kane Parsons as director and Will Soodik as writer. On July 9, 2026, the page included Get Tickets and Pre-Order links to Apple TV, Amazon, Fandango at Home, and Kaleidescape.

title: Backrooms (2026) — title summary
notes: Dynamic title page. The cumulative total must always be quoted with an access date because it changes during the theatrical run.

title: Backrooms (2026) - Box Office and Financial Information
notes: Dynamic title page. On July 11, 2026 it listed $193.2 million domestic, $173.7 million international, and $366.9 million worldwide, plus a $10 million production budget and a July 10 daily domestic gross at rank 10. Totals should be rechecked before reuse.

title: Toy Story 5 box-office weekend report
notes: Reported Backrooms at approximately $301 million worldwide on June 21 and identified it as A24's first release above $300 million globally.

title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
creator: Eli Collins
notes: Confirms a research partnership intended to develop workflows and techniques with filmmakers. It does not identify Backrooms or any other specific production.

title: Google DeepMind signs AI research deal with film studio A24
creator: Anhata Rooprai and Dawn Chmielewski
notes: Confirms the partnership and attributes the approximately $75 million figure to The Wall Street Journal; DeepMind did not confirm the amount to Reuters.

title: Google Investing in ‘Backrooms’ Studio A24 as Part of New AI Research Partnership
creator: Ben Fritz
notes: Reports that Google is investing around $75 million in A24 and that the companies intend to develop tools for film production and distribution.

title: ‘Backrooms’: Here’s The Current State Of A Sequel For Kane Parsons
notes: Reports a sequel in early development and says Parsons was seeking a screenwriting collaborator. This is not a release commitment or production-start confirmation.

title: Post describing Kane Parsons' exploratory interest in a Portal film
creator: Kyle Buchanan
notes: Buchanan says he asked Parsons in early May about directing Portal and reports Parsons was already looking into it with caution and curiosity. This establishes exploratory interest, not a commissioned project.

title: Backrooms director Kane Parsons has visited Valve, and the chances of a Portal movie happening just shot up
creator: Fay Watson
notes: Documents Instagram Story images from Valve headquarters. Neither the purpose of the visit nor a Portal production was confirmed.

title: Backrooms: Everything Must Go Edition w/ Extra Footage
notes: Lists a July 3, 2026 opening, a 126-minute runtime, showtimes through July 9, and 15 minutes of new theatrically exclusive post-credit footage. Notes that the bonus content does not have open captions.

title: What to Stream: Rolling Stones, ‘Little House on the Prairie’ and ‘Backrooms’
creator: The Associated Press
notes: Reports that Backrooms makes its premium video-on-demand debut on July 7, 2026, available for purchase on major streaming services. Does not state whether the Everything Must Go bonus footage is included.

title: Japanese Backrooms Trailer and Release Date
notes: Community report that surfaced the September 4 Japanese release before the official distributor page was added to the archive.

title: Backrooms
notes: Official Japanese distributor page listing a September 4, 2026 release date and identifying Kane Parsons as director.

title: ‘Backrooms’ Director Kane Parsons Calls AI ‘Genuinely Harmful’ To Creativity
notes: Reports Parsons' criticism of generative AI in creative work from an interview with The Australian.

title: A24’s Bad Excuse For Its Controversial Google AI Partnership Isn’t Impressing Fans
creator: Lewis Parker
notes: Reports a statement from Parsons' official Discord saying he was making clear that the partnership's resources were not to be spent on Backrooms. The original Discord context should be archived before promotion to primary evidence.

title: Backrooms Director Kane Parsons Talks Developing YouTube Series Into Box Office Horror
creator: Khal
notes: Direct interview in which Parsons identifies The Oldest View and People Still Live Here as the two other YouTube series he would discuss and says People Still Live Here has the stronger chance of carrying forward. Does not supply a schedule or confirm active production.

title: Kane Pixels — official YouTube channel and playlists
creator: Kane Parsons
notes: Primary index for uploads and playlist surfaces. The final pre-publication pass showed People Still Live Here among the channel playlists and visible official uploads including Sunshine, People Still Live Here (2005) - DAY 2 GAMEPLAY, Graveyard, and People Still Live Here V8.3 (2005 Gameplay). Upload and playlist presence are not used to infer whether a series is actively in production, paused, or cancelled.

title: People Still Live Here (Playlist)
creator: Kane Pixels
notes: Official playlist surface for People Still Live Here. On July 6, 2026 the accessible page exposed entries including Kane Parsons - People Still Live Here - Full Album (2022), SAYWELL, People Still Live Here V8.3 (2005 Gameplay), Graveyard, People Still Live Here (2005) - DAY 2 GAMEPLAY, Sunshine, and Shepherdbossfight.wav (real). Playlist presence confirms grouping, not current production status.

title: Backrooms
notes: Retailer listing showed Backrooms as available to pre-order in UHD for $24.99 with release date coming soon, not as an immediately rentable or purchasable title. The page did not identify whether Everything Must Go bonus footage is included.

title: Backrooms
notes: Retailer listing showed Backrooms as available to pre-order in UHD for $24.99 and listed Release Date: July 13, 2026 9:00 PM PDT. The page did not identify whether Everything Must Go bonus footage is included.

title: Backrooms
notes: Official A24 film page continued to expose Get Tickets plus Pre-Order links to Apple TV, Amazon, Fandango at Home, and Kaleidescape during the July 11 check. The page did not itself expose a July 14 date or Everything Must Go home-video inclusion.

title: Backrooms
notes: Retailer listing showed Backrooms as available to pre-order and listed Release Date: July 13, 2026 9:00 PM PDT. The listing exposed the original version and did not identify Everything Must Go footage or a separate extended edition.

title: Apple TV search result for Backrooms
notes: Search result page displayed Backrooms as unavailable in the U.S. storefront on July 8, 2026. Search pages are volatile and should be rechecked before any publication claim.

title: When Is the 'Backrooms' Digital Release Date?
creator: Anna Menta
notes: Reported that Backrooms did not arrive on digital platforms on July 7 despite earlier expectations, and that A24 had not confirmed a digital date. Useful as a report on the missed expectation, not as primary release metadata.

title: Backrooms Comes Home On Digital July 14, 2026 From A24
creator: Kevin Lovell
notes: Reports A24 announced Backrooms will be available to rent or buy on digital beginning July 14, 2026 and includes pre-order messaging. Does not describe Everything Must Go footage as included.

title: Backrooms Heads Home to Digital Next Week
creator: Meagan Navarro
notes: Reports that A24 and Kane Parsons' Backrooms will be available to rent or buy digitally on Tuesday, July 14. It frames the date after the record-breaking theatrical run and extended-cut re-release, but does not state that bonus footage carries over.

title: How To Watch A24's Backrooms Movie At Home
creator: Jeremy Mathai
notes: Reports the digital release as confirmed for July 14, 2026 and says buyers/renters will use online retailers including Fandango, Amazon, and Apple. Notes that bonus-feature details remained limited at publication time.

title: After Backrooms' Success, Internet Horror-Verse The SCP Foundation Is Getting Its First Movie
creator: Nick Venable
notes: Frames Backrooms and Obsession as examples of internet-originated horror success while reporting an SCP Foundation feature-length adaptation through the V/H/S franchise. Useful as market-context evidence, not as a Kane Parsons project update.

title: Backrooms
notes: Retailer page linked from A24's official Backrooms page during the July 9 pre-publication check. Static page extraction did not expose reliable price, release-date, or bonus-footage metadata.

title: Kane Pixels — official YouTube channel check
creator: Kane Parsons
notes: Official channel surface check did not expose a new canonical People Still Live Here or Backrooms-series upload beyond already-tracked visible titles such as Backrooms trailer/teaser entries, Static Dead End, Sunshine, and Found Footage entries.

title: A24 post announcing Backrooms: Everything Must Go
creator: A24
notes: Official A24 post said Backrooms: Everything Must Go was playing in theaters nationwide and featured 16 minutes of brand-new footage from Parsons.

title: Backrooms: Everything Must Go Edition with Bonus Footage
notes: Listed showtimes through July 16 and described the edition as 16 minutes of new, theatrically-exclusive post-credit bonus footage. Also noted the bonus content does not have accessibility features, while the film itself does.

title: Backrooms: Everything Must Go Edition w/Bonus Footage
notes: Listed an expanded theatrical cut ending July 9 at the Newhall location, with 15 minutes of brand-new, theatrically exclusive post-credit footage and a 127-minute runtime.

title: Backrooms director says he treated the extended cut like one of his YouTube projects
creator: Megan Garside
notes: Reported Parsons' Discord comments that the Everything Must Go footage was made in just under two weeks, all in Blender on his laptop, and delivered through a YouTube-like pipeline. The original Discord post should still be archived if available.

title: Backrooms Director Kane Parsons Teases Sequel, 'Unfinished' Story Following Box Office Smash
creator: Lily Brown
notes: Reports Parsons' Rotten Tomatoes interview comments that there is a narrative plan for Backrooms, that the story has not been completed, and that no sequel had been officially greenlit. Useful background for sequel language.
